nodes.name: 合恩角市镇
nodes.summary: 合恩角市镇是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括红头美洲鹫，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 旧大陆鹫类
nodes.summary: 旧大陆鹫类是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联5种鸟类，包括红头美洲鹫、黑兀鹫、白腰兀鷲等5种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 美洲
nodes.summary: 美洲是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联24种鸟类，包括疣鼻棲鴨、Pied-billed grebe、Pale-vented pigeon等24种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 湿地
nodes.summary: 浅水、沼泽与植被斑块组成的高生产力生态系统。

nodes.name: 红头美洲鹫
nodes.summary: 红头美洲鹫（Turkey vulture，学名 Cathartes aura），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于旧大陆鹫类、美洲、合恩角市镇，常见栖息地包括灌丛、湿地。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It inhabits a variety of open and semi-open areas, including subtropical forests, shrublands, pastures, and deserts. Like all New World vultures, it is not closely related to the Old World vultures of Europe, Africa, and Asia

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Available from https://www.mbr-pwrc.usgs.gov/bbs/ It is found in open and semi-open areas throughout the Americas from southern Canada to Cape Horn

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Available from https://www.mbr-pwrc.usgs.gov/bbs/ It is found in open and semi-open areas throughout the Americas from southern Canada to Cape Horn

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It inhabits a variety of open and semi-open areas, including subtropical forests, shrublands, pastures, and deserts. Like all New World vultures, it is not closely related to the Old World vultures of Europe, Africa, and Asia

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: University of Nebraska Press, Lincoln, NE, USA. Additionally, they may adapt to tropical and subtropical forests, shrublands, deserts and semi-desert, wetlands and foothills. Evidence indicates agricultural land is key habitat for turkey vultures, mainly pastureland or other low-input farmland for foraging and roosting but they tend to only occur ephemerally as flyovers around row-crop type agriculture.Graber, R
